scripts.export:muscular: SYSTEM=muscular OUT_GLB=$PWD/public/models/muscular.glb OUT_CAT=$PWD/src/data/muscular.catalog.json OUT_REP=/tmp/report_muscular.json blender --background ${BLEND:-$HOME/Desktop/untitled.blend} --python scripts/export_systems.py && node scripts/compress-glb.mjs public/models/muscular.glb
scripts.export:skeletal: SYSTEM=skeletal OUT_GLB=$PWD/public/models/skeletal.glb OUT_CAT=$PWD/src/data/skeletal.catalog.json OUT_REP=/tmp/report_skeletal.json blender --background ${BLEND:-$HOME/Desktop/untitled.blend} --python scripts/export_systems.py && node scripts/compress-glb.mjs public/models/skeletal.glb
scripts.export:systems: npm run export:skeletal && npm run export:muscular
